rules.name: commit-message-trailer
rules.evidence: conventional commits (`feat:`/`fix:`/`docs:`/`chore:`) with a `Co-Authored-By: Claude` trailer when written via Claude Code.

rules.name: changelog-dual-view-edit
rules.evidence: Every release in CHANGELOG.md leads with 🌱 In plain English (anyone can follow it) then 🔧 Technical notes (entity/code detail). Keep both when adding a release.

rules.name: changelog-dual-view-write
rules.evidence: Every release in CHANGELOG.md leads with 🌱 In plain English (anyone can follow it) then 🔧 Technical notes (entity/code detail). Keep both when adding a release.

rules.name: state-field-safe-default
rules.evidence: Adding a state field → add it to `_fresh_zone` with a safe default and read it with `.get(k)` / `is not None`; never assume it exists in an old file.

rules.name: addon-option-safe-default
rules.evidence: Never require the operator to wipe state, re-run setup, reconfigure, or hand-migrate a schema.

rules.name: entity-change-additive-only
rules.evidence: Integration entity changes → additive. Renaming/removing an entity an old install relies on is breaking; avoid or migrate.

rules.name: no-hardcoded-f2-values-edit
rules.evidence: F2-specific values are defaults/overrides, never hardcoded assumptions... A change that only works because of F2's exact names or numbers is a bug.

rules.name: no-hardcoded-f2-values-write
rules.evidence: F2-specific values are defaults/overrides, never hardcoded assumptions... A change that only works because of F2's exact names or numbers is a bug.

rules.name: no-black-reformat-f2-control
rules.evidence: black is scoped — the add-on is deployed file-for-file to the live box and stays exempt from reformatting

skill_candidates.summary: F2 엔진/애드온 코드 배포 절차: 변경 모듈을 addons/f2_control/에 복사한 뒤 Supervisor UI에서 Rebuild (재시작만으로는 새 코드가 반영되지 않음), 통합 변경은 Developer Tools → Reload Custom Components
skill_candidates.evidence: Deploying engine changes: copy changed modules to `addons/f2_control/` on the live box, then Rebuild the add-on from Supervisor (⋮ → Rebuild) — the Dockerfile `COPY f2_control /app` bakes the code into the image at build time, so a plain restart reuses the old image and does NOT pick up code changes

skill_candidates.summary: 배포 검증 절차: API로는 rebuild가 불가능해 운영자가 UI에서 직접 Rebuild해야 하며, 반영 여부는 재시작이 아니라 라이브 펌프의 구동 이력(switch.veg_main_pump history)으로 확인
skill_candidates.evidence: Deploy = Rebuild, never Restart... Verify shot length from the live pump, not from "deployed". A shot's duration is the only proof a sizing change took — pull `switch.veg_main_pump` history (`/api/history/period`) and read the on-period seconds.

always_on: 레포 개요 및 2계층 아키텍처(HA 통합 vs f2-control 애드온) 설명
Dev 커맨드 목록(ruff/yamllint, pytest 2종, ha addons logs) — 사용 가능한 명령 카탈로그, 특정 트리거 없음
P0–P3 관수 페이즈 로직 설명 및 grow-day/dryback 정의
테스트 스위트 개요 및 bash tests/run_ci.sh 안내(구체적 트리거 액션 없이 일반 안내)
커밋 스타일 중 '단일 활성 브랜치 main, 은퇴 브랜치는 archive/* 태그' 부분(구체 트리거 없음)
라이브 설치 호환성 원칙 총론(모든 변경은 무중단 업그레이드 + 제로셋업 신규설치 지원) — 세부 항목은 개별 규칙으로 반영됨
상태/옵션 저장 위치 설명(/data/state.json, /data/options.json, atomic write)
Fresh install 요건(추가 레이어 없이 동작) 총론
v0.8.0 변경 이력: feed_ec_sensor/feed_ph_sensor 옵션화 — F2가 Supervisor UI에서 직접 설정해야 함(레포 파일 편집이 아닌 운영 설정)
test_state_migration.py / test_version_consistency.py 존재 및 run_ci.sh 재안내(구체적 트리거 불명확)
샷 사이징 공식(zone 단위 substrate/flow 계산) 및 F2 실측값 레퍼런스
과거 RootSense/ClimateSense intelligence 레이어 폐기 이력
